title: dacryodes edulis
intro: Dacryodes edulis, also known as the African tree nut or bush mango, is a tropical plant species native to West Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dacryodes edulis include the potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. The herbal preparations of Dacryodes edulis include oil extracted from its seeds, which is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, and the fruit is also consumed locally for its nutritional value.
